summary: SMS Event Type Attribution Bug Fix (Iteration 176) - All 14 backend tests PASSED. Fixed missing event_type in API response for sms_personal channel. Frontend loads correctly, performance dashboard shows correct texts count (28).

minor.issue: event_type was not being returned in API response for sms_personal channel (FIXED)

critical_code_review_comments: FIX APPLIED: Added message['event_type'] = event_type in sms_personal channel handler (both send endpoints)
resolve_event_type defaults to 'personal_sms' when no explicit event_type is passed - this is correct behavior
Frontend thread/[id].tsx correctly does NOT pass pendingEventType for personal SMS (line 668-684) - card events are logged separately
Performance dashboard correctly counts texts as: sms_sent + sms_personal + personal_sms + sms_failed
Summary endpoint correctly counts texts using the same formula
Card shares (congrats/birthday/holiday/etc) are tracked separately in sharing.card_shares

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login works, dashboard loads, performance metrics display correctly

seed_data_creation: Created test contact events during testing (sms_sent, personal_sms, call_placed, email_sent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMS event type attribution bug is FIXED. Key change: POST /api/messages/send without event_type field and channel=sms_personal now resolves to event_type=personal_sms (logged in DB and returned in API response). The thread page personal SMS flow no longer passes pendingEventType to avoid double-counting card events. Performance dashboard shows correct texts count: sms_sent + sms_personal + personal_sms + sms_failed.

sms_event_type_resolution.event_type returned in API response: PASS - After fix applied to messages.py

performance_counts.GET /api/tasks/{userId}/summary activity: PASS - Counts sms_sent + sms_personal + personal_sms + sms_failed

frontend_pages./home: PASS - Dashboard loads with correct metrics (28 texts)

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - Personal SMS goes through native SMS app

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: Card share SMS events were stored with card-specific event_types (e.g., holiday_card_sent) instead of personal_sms. Performance dashboard only counts texts as sms_sent+sms_personal+personal_sms+sms_failed, so card SMS events were not counted.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend thread/[id].tsx was passing pendingEventType (e.g., holiday_card_sent) to the messages/send endpoint for personal SMS. This caused the SMS to be logged with the card event type instead of personal_sms.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1) Frontend no longer passes pendingEventType for personal SMS (card event is already logged separately by card creation flow). 2) Backend messages.py now sets message['event_type'] = event_type for sms_personal channel so the resolved type is returned in API response.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Sending SMS without event_type now correctly resolves to personal_sms and is counted in texts on the performance dashboard.
